title: iPhone Silver Jewelry Photoshoot & Editing
brief: I need a creative shooter-editor based in Nagpur who can capture my silver jewellery line with nothing more than a recent-generation iPhone and then polish every frame through AI-powered post-production. The look I’m after is minimalist and clean—crisp, shadow-controlled images on a pure or near-white backdrop that will slot straight into my online store without additional retouching. Here’s the flow: we meet at my workspace (or a mutually convenient studio in the city), set up simple tabletop lighting, and photograph each piece from multiple angles. After the shoot, you’ll run the files through tools such as Lightroom Mobile, Photoshop’s Generative Fill, Luminar AI, or a similar platform to remove imperfections, balance tones, isolate the jewellery on white, and export consistent, web-ready crops. Deliverables • 20 finished JPEGs (3000 × 3000 px, sRGB, <2 MB each) • Matching PNGs with transparent backgrounds • Original iPhone RAW/HEIC files plus layered PSDs or equivalent Acceptance criteria • Uniform white background, no colour cast • Accurate metal tone and gemstone colour • Pin-sharp focus on all hero angles • Files supplied via download link within five days of shoot If you have a compact lighting kit, a steady hand, and solid AI-retouch chops, let’s make these pieces shine.
